subTagline: Nairobi's most results-driven training facility. No excuses, just progress.
aboutTitle: We Don't Do Half Reps. In Training or in Life.
aboutDescription:
Ironclad Fitness was built for people who are serious about results. No gimmicks, no overcrowded machines, no egos. Just a community of people who show up, put in the work, and leave better than they came in.

Whether you're picking up your first dumbbell or training for your next competition — you belong here.

services.name: Weight Training
services.desc: Fully equipped free weights and machines. From beginners to powerlifters, we've got your setup.

services.name: HIIT Classes
services.desc: High-intensity interval training designed to torch fat and build endurance. 45 minutes, max results.

services.name: Yoga & Mobility
services.desc: Recovery and flexibility sessions to keep your body working the way it should.

services.name: Boxing & MMA
services.desc: Bag work, technique, sparring — for fitness or competition. Bags, gloves, and coaches provided.

services.name: Cardio Zone
services.desc: Treadmills, bikes, rowers. The boring stuff that actually matters. 24/7 accessible.

services.name: Personal Training
services.desc: One-on-one sessions with a certified trainer who actually listens to what you want to achieve.

programs.name: 30-Day Shred
programs.tagline: Lose 5–10kg in 30 days. Guaranteed progress or your money back.

programs.name: 12-Week Strength Builder
programs.tagline: Go from beginner to lifting serious weight with a structured periodized program.

programs.name: Fight Camp
programs.tagline: 8 weeks to fight-ready. Boxing technique, conditioning, and mental toughness.

transformations.name: Kevin M.
transformations.quote: I'd tried three gyms before this. None of them actually pushed me. Ironclad was different — the coaches remember your name, they push you when you want to quit, and they celebrate every win. Best decision I've made.

transformations.name: Wanjiru N.
transformations.quote: I was the most unfit person in the HIIT class on day one. Aisha said 'just survive today.' Eight months later I ran the Standard Chartered Marathon 10K. I cried at the finish line.

transformations.name: Samuel K.
transformations.quote: James built me a 12-week program and literally every month I hit a new personal best. Six months in, I competed for the first time. I didn't win — but I also didn't care. I was there.

trainers.name: James Ochieng
trainers.bio: James has been coaching athletes and everyday people in Nairobi for over 8 years. He holds a BSc in Sports Science from the University of Nairobi and is certified by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). His specialty is periodized strength programming — building a base, then systematically pushing athletes to new levels every month.
trainers.quote: Consistency beats intensity every time. Show up, do the work, trust the process.

trainers.name: Aisha Kimani
trainers.bio: Aisha is the energy of Ironclad. Her HIIT and yoga classes have become the most popular in the gym — not because they're easy, but because she somehow makes suffering feel fun. She holds a diploma in Nutrition Science and designs custom meal plans for members who want results beyond the gym floor.
trainers.quote: The goal is to make your body a place you're proud to live in.

trainers.name: Brian Mutua
trainers.bio: Brian is a former national amateur boxing champion who transitioned into coaching after 5 years of competitive fighting. He's trained fighters who have gone on to compete nationally and regionally. His classes aren't just for fighters — anyone who wants the best conditioning workout of their life should be in his sessions.
certifications: Kenya Amateur Boxing Federation Coach License
trainers.quote: Boxing teaches you more about yourself in one round than most sports teach you in a season.

testimonials.name: Kevin M.
testimonials.text: Best gym in Westlands, full stop. The trainers actually push you and the equipment is always clean and working. Lost 12kg in 4 months.

testimonials.name: Wanjiru N.
testimonials.text: I was nervous joining a gym for the first time but the community here made me feel at home immediately. Now I come 5x a week and can't imagine not training here.

testimonials.name: Samuel K.
testimonials.text: James is a phenomenal coach. He built me a 12-week strength program and I hit a new deadlift PB every single month. Highly recommend the PT sessions.

faqs.q: Do I need any fitness experience to join?
faqs.a: Absolutely not. We have members who had never set foot in a gym before joining us. Every trainer here started someone at zero. You'll be placed in the right class for your level from day one.

faqs.q: What does the free trial include?
faqs.a: 7 full days of unlimited access — any class, all the equipment, open gym access. No commitment required. Just show up, train, and see if we're the right fit for you.
We accept M-Pesa, bank transfer, and cash. Monthly memberships are charged on your join date each month. You can cancel anytime with 7 days' notice.
Yes, we have free parking for members in the basement of the building. Street parking is also available on the main road.
Yes. Life happens. You can freeze your membership for up to 60 days per year — for travel, injury, or anything else. Just let us know in advance.
Yes. All three of our head coaches offer one-on-one PT sessions. Pricing starts at Ksh 2,000 per session or Ksh 15,000 for a package of 8 sessions.

whatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to know more about joining Ironclad Fitness.
